recommendations.title: Lorenzo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Horror
recommendations.overview: A cat named Lorenzo is dismayed to discover that his tail has developed a personality of its own.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young aspiring violinist unwittingly becomes involved with a criminal gang.

recommendations.title: Return of the Killer Tomatoes!
recommendations.overview: Crazy old Professor Gangreen has developed a way to make tomatoes look human for a second invasion.

recommendations.title: Family Pack
recommendations.overview: When an old card game comes to life, a family jumps back in time to a medieval village where they must unmask werewolves to secure their return home.

recommendations.title: Warm Bodies
recommendations.overview: After a zombie becomes involved with the girlfriend of one of his victims, their romance sets in motion a sequence of events that might transform the entire lifeless world.

recommendations.title: Ginger Snaps Back: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: Set in 19th Century Canada, Brigitte and her sister Ginger take refuge in a Traders' Fort which later becomes under siege by some savage werewolves. But when one of the girls is bitten, they have no one to turn to but themselves.

recommendations.title: Ghoulies
recommendations.overview: A young man and his girlfriend move into the man's old mansion home, where he becomes possessed by a need to control ancient demons.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: There's Something in the Barn
recommendations.overview: An American family fulfills their dream of moving back to their roots after inheriting a remote cabin in the mountains of Norway. But there's a surprise waiting for them.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of God
recommendations.overview: An American priest working in Mexico is considered a saint by many local parishioners. However, due to a botched exorcism, he carries a secret that’s eating him alive until he gets an opportunity to face his demon one final time.
